name: Cake in Ice Cream Cones: Heloise's Edible Cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the cake mix batter according to the instructions on the box.
2. Place the flat-bottomed ice-cream cones in a muffin tin.
3. Fill each cone about halfway with the batter.
4. Bake the cupcakes according to the directions on the box.
5. Allow the cupcakes to cool completely before proceeding.
6. Add your favorite frosting and decorate as desired with sprinkles, jimmies, gumdrops, cherries, etc.
7. Note: Check the box for the number of cupcakes your mix typically yields.
